title: Divider component for horizontal and vertical layout separation
purpose: Provides a reusable UI component for creating dividers with optional labels, supporting both horizontal and vertical orientations with appropriate styling for light and dark modes.
module_context: Exports a React functional component Divider with typed props interface and displayName set to 'Divider'.

steps.content: Render a vertical divider with label when orientation is vertical and label is provided.
ELSE render a vertical divider without label when orientation is vertical but no label is provided.
ELSE render a horizontal divider with label when orientation is horizontal and label is provided.
ELSE render a horizontal divider without label when orientation is horizontal and no label is provided.
